replies.msg: http://www.hkrabbit.org/knowledge9_ch.php

Rabbits are prey animals which means they're everybody else's lunch in nature. A dog barking, a child shouting, a fire engine siren wailing, an aeroplane flying overhead and a lightning storm can frighten rabbits. Therefore, walking your rabbit on a leash isn't recommended. Indoor rabbits have a much longer lifespan than outdoor rabbits because they're protected from poor weather conditions and enemies. They feel safe, sheltered, protected, monitored and that they're part of the family! The average lifespan of an indoor house rabbit is eight to fourteen years while the average lifespan of a rabbit kept in an outdoor hutch is three to six years. The happiest rabbit expression is called binky. When a rabbit binkies, it jumps into the air and twists its head and body in the opposite direction before falling back to the ground. A happy rabbit even twirls, flops, stretches its legs and shakes its head. All this is telling you that it's happy and overall pleased with you and its life. Rabbits produce two types of droppings: fecal pellets and cecal pellets (aka cecotropes). The former are the dry, round ones you usually see in the litterbox while the latter are edible for rabbits which contain essential nutrients. Rabbits are one of the most abandoned pets in the world. In fact, it's the third most abandoned pets in the United States because people don't understand rabbits. They think rabbits are boring and that they don't bond with humans. Rabbits are highly intelligent, social and affectionate animals. While they don't like to be picked up from the ground, they much prefer to be petted and cuddled while they're on the ground or in your lap. When people say they want to have a pet rabbit, I usually advise them to visit the rabbit society and choose a rabbit for adoption.

Dr hugh 真係好好，我兔女上年四月去做，頸cool都唔駛帶，一兩日後同平時冇分別，上年價錢大約1800。
兔女絕育比仔仔風險高，因為要開刀，唔好因為幾百而較飛，一定要搵間口碑最好，否則會後悔一生。
